Case Study • Various

How we helped Sri All India Export Earns EcoVadis Gold Rating, Strengthening Its Global Leadership in Responsible and Sustainable Trade

The Challenge

Detailed inside.

Our Solution

Detailed inside.

The Results

Detailed inside.

Sri All India Export, a long-established manufacturer and exporter of handloom and power-loom cotton fabrics, has been awarded the EcoVadis Gold Medal with an exceptional overall score of 81/100, placing the company among the top sustainability performers worldwide. This recognition highlights more than four decades of Sri All India Export’s commitment to quality, responsible sourcing, and ethical global trade.

The company delivered Outstanding and Advanced scores across the EcoVadis sustainability pillars:

Environment: 86 / 100

Labor & Human Rights: 75 / 100

Ethics: 84 / 100

Sustainable Procurement: 84 / 100

This achievement reflects Sri All India Export’s commitment to embedding sustainability across its value chain, supported through a comprehensive ESG transformation partnership with Growlity. Under the leadership of Dr. Nitin Dumasia, President & CEO, Growlity provided end-to-end guidance — including a structured sustainability roadmap, development and enhancement of ESG and governance policies, strengthened reporting and disclosure systems, GHG emissions (Scopes 1, 2 & 3) calculation support, supplier sustainability assessments, and improvements in internal governance controls. This integrated, standards-aligned approach enabled Sri All India Export to earn perfect scores in Policies, Measures, and Reporting, reflecting a strong and well-established sustainability framework.

Messages From Sri All India Export

“Receiving the EcoVadis Gold Medal is a proud moment for Sri All India Export. Our long-standing reputation has been built on trust, quality, and responsibility, and this achievement reinforces our commitment to strengthening these values for future generations.” said Mr. Ramesh, Senior Leadership Representative, Sri All India Export.

Messages From Sri All India Export

“Receiving the EcoVadis Gold Medal is a proud moment for Sri All India Export. Our long-standing reputation has been built on trust, quality, and responsibility, and this achievement reinforces our commitment to strengthening these values for future generations.” said Mr. Ramesh, Senior Leadership Representative, Sri All India Export.

“Sustainability has always been integral to our operations, and this recognition demonstrates the progress we have made in aligning with global expectations. We will continue advancing our environmental and ethical standards to remain a reliable partner in international textile markets.” said ****Mr. S.P. Selvam, Senior Leadership, Representative, Sri All India Export.

Message From Growlity Pvt. Ltd.

“Sri All India Export’s Gold rating reflects a strong and genuine commitment to sustainability excellence. Their performance in Environment, Ethics, and Sustainable Procurement showcases the impact of disciplined ESG integration. We are proud to have supported them in this transformative journey and congratulate the entire team on this global achievement.” said Dr. Nitin Dumasia , President & CEO, Growlity Pvt. Ltd.,

We are proud to have supported them in this transformative journey and congratulate the entire team on this global achievement.” said Dr. Nitin Dumasia , President & CEO, Growlity Pvt. Ltd.,

About Sri All India Export

With over 40 years of expertise and headquartered in Karur, Tamil Nadu, Sri All India Export is a respected manufacturer and exporter of cotton fabrics, specializing in handloom and power-loom production. The company is known for its quality craftsmanship, ethical sourcing, and long-standing reliability in global textile markets. Sri All India Export continues to invest in sustainability, operational excellence, and responsible value chain practices to serve international customers with integrity and innovation

About Growlity Private Limited

Growlity is a globally trusted ESG and sustainability advisory firm committed to driving measurable impact and responsible transformation. Led by Dr. Nitin Dumasia, the firm specializes in EcoVadis performance enhancement, ESG policy development, sustainability reporting, and carbon management. With a presence in 25+ countries, Growlity partners with forward-thinking organizations to strengthen ethical, resilient, and future-ready business practices.
